ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_weight" REAL /* Weight of the item in kg */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item's weight */,
  "fat_content" INTEGER /* Fat content indicator (0 = Low Fat, 1 = Regular) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility score of the item on store shelves */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type/category of the item (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks) */,
  "item_mrp" REAL /* Maximum retail price of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the item */,
  "item_image" TEXT /* Image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlets" (
  "outlet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each outlet */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlet was established */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2) */,
  "outlet_type" TEXT /* Type of outlet (e.g., Supermarket, Grocery Store) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Outlet address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Outlet city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Outlet state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Outlet country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Outlet zip code */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Outlet phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Outlet email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item sold */,
  "outlet_id" TEXT /* ID of the outlet where the sale occurred */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_time" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Sales amount in local currency */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_by_item" (
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the item across all outlets */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Count of transactions for the item */,
  "average_sales" REAL /* Average sales amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_by_outlet" (
  "outlet_id" TEXT /* ID of the outlet */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the outlet */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Count of transactions for the outlet */,
  "average_sales" REAL /* Average sales amount for the outlet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_data" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for visibility record */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* ID of the item */,
  "outlet_id" TEXT /* ID of the outlet */,
  "visibility_score" REAL /* Visibility score for the item in that outlet */,
  "visibility_date" TEXT /* Date when the visibility score was recorded */,
  "visibility_time" TEXT /* Time when the visibility score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_data_outlet_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlet_id") REFERENCES outlets ("outlet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Dairy, Soft Drinks, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "filter_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for generating the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
